title: POI v2 model — core (multilang content, nullable coordinates, curation columns)

tasks.title: Add POI v2 columns + nullable lat/long to dbschema
tasks.description: In packages/db/src/schemas/destination/point-of-interest.dbschema.ts: drop NOT NULL on lat/long (doublePrecision nullable); add nameI18n (jsonb null, $type<I18nText>()), descriptionI18n (jsonb null, $type<I18nText>()), translationMeta (jsonb null default {}, $type<TranslationMeta>()); address (text null), keywords (text[].array() null), hasOwnPage (boolean notNull default false); curation cols verified (boolean notNull default false), verifiedAt (timestamptz null), source (text null), notes (text null). Add pointsOfInterest_verified_idx on verified. Add @deprecated JSDoc on the type column pointing at HOS-139 (§6.6). Mirror destinations' plain+I18n co-existence (destination.dbschema.ts:54-62). Tests: none at this layer (covered by migration + schema tasks).

tasks.title: Generate structural migration 0052 + verify drift guard
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:generate to emit 0052_*.sql: ALTER COLUMN lat/long DROP NOT NULL + ADD COLUMN for every new col in §7.1 + create verified index. No USING conversion needed. Confirm the db:generate drift guard passes with no further diff (AC-1). Do NOT hand-edit the SQL beyond what generate produces. Tests: drift guard (CI) is the verification.

tasks.title: Extend PointOfInterestSchema with v2 fields (Zod)
tasks.description: In packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.schema.ts (§7.3): add .nullable() to bounded lat/long z.number(); add nameI18n: I18nTextSchema.nullish(), descriptionI18n: I18nTextSchema.nullish(), translationMeta: TranslationMetaSchema.nullish() (mirror destination.schema.ts:69-77 verbatim); address: z.string().min(3).max(300).nullish(); keywords: z.array(z.string().min(1).max(50)).max(30).nullish(); hasOwnPage: z.boolean().default(false); verified: z.boolean().default(false); verifiedAt: z.date().nullish(); source: z.string().max(200).nullish(); notes: z.string().max(1000).nullish(). Add @deprecated JSDoc on the type field (unchanged shape). Reuse I18nTextSchema/TranslationMetaSchema from common/i18n.schema.ts. Tests: covered by T-004.

tasks.title: Update summary/mini projections + schema tests
tasks.description: Extend PointOfInterestSummarySchema/PointOfInterestMiniSchema .pick() projections: summary adds nameI18n + descriptionI18n + hasOwnPage; mini adds nameI18n (§7.3). Confirm CreateInput/UpdateInput crud schemas propagate the new fields automatically via .omit()/stripShapeDefaults (no manual shape change). Tests: unit tests asserting PointOfInterestSchema.safeParse accepts {lat:null,long:null} and every new field (AC-2); historic fixture compatibility tests in test/fixtures/historic/ still pass unmodified.

subtasks.title: Unit tests: null coords + new fields parse

tasks.title: Null-guard resolvePoiToCoordinates + regression test
tasks.description: packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation/accommodation.poi-proximity.helper.ts:115-120: when resolved POI has lat===null||long===null, return { found: false } (same treatment as soft-deleted/non-ACTIVE at lines 111-113) so no null reaches buildWithinRadiusClause's numeric SQL. Tests (AC-3): regression test mocks a POI service response with null coordinates and asserts { found: false }; assert no numeric value reaches geo-SQL helpers.

tasks.title: Null-guard resolvePoiConstraint + regression test
tasks.description: apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/poi-resolver.ts:193,224-226: when poiResult.data.lat===null||long===null, degrade to { kind: 'none' } (constraint skipped) instead of destructuring into the constrain variant — mirrors existing non-fatal-degrade paths. Tests (AC-4): dedicated regression test for the null-coordinate primary POI match returning { kind: 'none' }.

tasks.title: Widen getPointsOfInterestMap lat/long to number|null + hydrate i18n
tasks.description: packages/db/src/models/destination/destination.model.ts:497-582 (getPointsOfInterestMap): type returned map entries' lat/long as number|null (lines 506-507,546-547), select without null-guard crashing; also select nameI18n/descriptionI18n/hasOwnPage for the destination-detail hydration path so the web section can prefer multilang content (§6.4). Tests (AC-5): does not throw on a row with null coordinates; compiles under number|null typing.

subtasks.title: Type lat/long map entries as number|null
Test: no throw on null-coord row

tasks.title: Make translatePoiName nameI18n-aware (poi-labels.ts)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/lib/poi-labels.ts:44-72: translatePoiName gains a nameI18n-aware parameter — prefer resolveI18nText(nameI18n, locale) (from apps/web/src/lib/resolve-i18n-text.ts) when non-null, fall back to the existing i18n-by-slug destinations.poiNames.<slug> lookup when null (§6.1). Keep the humanized-slug last-resort fallback (never crash). Tests: unit test both branches (nameI18n present → resolved; null → slug lookup).

tasks.title: Wire DestinationPOISection.astro to i18n resolution (no-op visual)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationPOISection.astro:44-56,76: resolve display name via the updated poi-labels.ts helper and description via resolveI18nText(descriptionI18n, locale) ?? poi.description, instead of calling translatePoiName / rendering poi.description directly (§6.4). MUST be visually a no-op for the existing 12 POIs (AC-8). Tests: manual smoke visiting the 6 seeded destination detail pages (AC-8) — assert unchanged display name/description.

subtasks.title: Manual no-op smoke on 6 destination pages

tasks.title: Seed baseline: add i18n content to 12 POI fixtures
tasks.description: packages/seed/src/data/pointOfInterest/00N-*.json (12 fixtures): each gains nameI18n (all three locales set to the POI's current destinations.poiNames.<slug> es entry from @repo/i18n; en/pt = same es placeholder per NG-6) and descriptionI18n (from the existing plain description field in each fixture). translationMeta seeded as { name: { es: {autoTranslated:false, translatedAt:<seed ISO>} }, description: {...} }. Confirm normalizePointOfInterestSeedItem in pointsOfInterest.seed.ts accepts the new fields. Tests: seed factory parse of updated fixtures.

subtasks.title: Add nameI18n to 12 fixtures (es from i18n key)

tasks.title: Data migration 0010-hos-138-poi-v2-model-core
tasks.description: packages/seed/src/data-migrations/0010-hos-138-poi-v2-model-core.ts (next sequential after 0009): apply identical nameI18n/descriptionI18n/translationMeta values to the 12 already-seeded rows on live envs, by slug lookup, idempotent (skip a POI whose nameI18n is already non-null). Mirror structure of 0009-hos-113-points-of-interest.ts. Ledgered in seed_migrations. Tests: idempotency (re-run skips), and applies to a pre-HOS-138-shaped row.

tasks.title: Verify dual-write convergence (fresh + live path)
tasks.description: AC-6: confirm the 12 POIs carry non-null nameI18n/descriptionI18n after pnpm db:fresh-dev (baseline path) AND after pnpm db:seed:migrate against a staging-shaped pre-existing DB (data-migration path) — both converge to identical content. Verify check-seed-dual-write.sh passes (pointOfInterest glob already tracked). Tests: this task IS the verification (both seed paths).

subtasks.title: Fresh DB path: db:fresh-dev populates i18n
Live path: db:seed:migrate on pre-shaped DB

tasks.title: Quality gate + AC-8 no-op smoke
tasks.description: AC-7/AC-8: run pnpm typecheck and the relevant test suites (@repo/db, @repo/schemas, @repo/service-core, apps/api, apps/web), confirm ≥90% coverage on the new null-guard branches, run check-seed-dual-write.sh, and perform the manual AC-8 smoke (pnpm dev, visit each of the 6 seeded destination detail pages that render POIs, confirm zero visual/content regression on the POI section). Resource-care: scope suites, run sequentially (per user prefs).

subtasks.title: Manual AC-8 no-op smoke on 6 pages
